description:
Goal
Replace return facts that pretend a ready `Ty` always exists with explicit `ReturnEvidence`. A missing fact means no current evidence has been produced. A produced fact says what was actually learned: known concrete return type, explicit dynamic/unknown boundary evidence, or no-return control flow. No consumer should infer readiness from `Option<Ty>`, `none`, or `any`.

Signal
- The work is executed through the child tickets in dependency order; this parent is a plan container, not a one-commit task.
- `FactKey::ReturnType` and `return_type.defined` are removed or deliberately renamed to `ReturnEvidence` / `return_evidence.defined` with a payload that is not just a bare `Ty`.
- `ActivationMap` stores explicit return evidence; activation-cycle ascent applies only to the known-type component.
- Semantic callers wait on absent current return evidence instead of publishing `none`; downstream completeness consumers wait on settled return evidence.
- Explicit dynamic/top and no-return/bottom remain possible only as named semantic evidence, not as readiness placeholders.

Strategy
1. Introduce the return-evidence payload end-to-end at the activation fact boundary.
2. Make call resolution stop when required return evidence is absent, preserving current-read scheduler semantics.
3. Move `Ty` projection to explicit boundaries that truly need a type-shaped value.
4. Delete old `ReturnType` naming, telemetry, tests, and docs residue before `any`/`none` cleanup begins.

Outro
No `ReturnType`-as-ready-`Ty`, no `Option<Ty>` return slot standing for readiness, no absent-callee-as-`none`, no unknown-callee-as-`any`, no recursive-function switch for return widening, no cyclic widening outside the evidence domain, and no downstream consumer that infers readiness from a type value.

comments.text: Reordered behind fz-rh2.18.9 because ReturnEvidence should land on top of activation keys that already separate identity partition from input evidence. Otherwise it risks preserving raw-evidence keying under a cleaner return-fact name.

title: Compiler2 semantics: replace ReturnType with ReturnEvidence
